sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42898" key="e(si/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἵημι</etym>) <sense id="n42898.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a mission, embassy,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, etc. ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐξ-εσίη.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
